title: Chapter 104
content:
Chapter 104: I Try to Return to My Original Star

Don’t panic just because you’ve been thrown out into space. There’s still oxygen left inside the barrier, so you won’t suffocate.

Stay calm.

My stats are one-tenth of Lucia’s.

Since force is calculated with a square, that means there’s a 100-fold difference.

In other words, if I generate the opposite force of what Lucia used to throw me 100 times, I should come to a stop. Then, after stopping, if I generate that same force 100 more times in the direction Lucia is in, I should be able to return to my original position.

I recall the conversation I had with Lucia earlier.

『You figured out I was here pretty quickly.』

『No matter where you are, I can tell. Masaharu, if you concentrate, you should be able to sense where I am too, right?』

—That’s right. I can sense the direction Lucia is in. So I just need to stop without panicking, then move toward her.

But how? How do I stop?

I can’t use Wind Pressure Masturbation. I might blow precious oxygen outside the barrier.

At first glance it seems like I’m stuck, but I have that

.

The magic I was too scared to use on the ground. Out here, there’s no risk of hurting anyone, so I can go all out.

No holding back!

"Haaaaaaa...!"

I thrust both hands forward in the direction of travel and focus my mind.

"Dye it in jet-black crimson! Darkness Fire!"

I feel dark power surging from both hands.

I can’t see anything because I fired dark-colored flames in space, but something definitely came out!

It was the same flame that once grew huge enough to engulf the entire fortress city of Monvahn. With this much power, I should be able to decelerate quite a bit.

If I repeat this a few times, I’ll sto—AAAAAAAHHHHHH!

Because I’m still moving according to the law of inertia, I flew straight into the flames I had just created.

It’s hot! I’m completely naked in space and it’s hot!

"GYAAAAAAAAAAHH! MY DIIIIICK!"

My body is fine, but for some reason the hair on my crotch caught fire.

I slap my groin to put out the flames.

"Disappear! Disappear!"

My body has high magic defense, so the dark flames don’t damage me, but my pubic hair was completely burned away.

"I-I see... Lucia doesn’t have any pubic hair. So the stat bonus didn’t apply to pubic hair... Thank god the bonus applied to my dick..."

It’s possible the bonus didn’t apply to my dick either, but since Lucia had praised it so many times, maybe God’s blessing protected it from the flames.

If the barrier hadn’t been there, I might have actually gotten hurt.

But I have no choice but to keep repeating this.

I’ll keep firing Darkness Fire until I cancel out Lucia’s throwing force.

Wait a second. Even though we’re in space, can I create wind? Flames came out even without oxygen, so I should be able to make wind without air too, right?

"Dye it in jet-black green! Darkness Wind!"

SHUUUUUUUUUUUOOOOOOH!

It worked! Something came out!

I can’t see anything because I fired dark-colored wind in space, but something definitely came out!

If I repeat this a few times, I’ll sto—AAAAAAAHHHHHH!

Because I’m still moving according to the law of inertia, I flew straight into the wind I had just created.

I’m spinning! My head’s spinning! I’m rotating like crazy!

"Dye it in jet-black green! Darkness Wind Reverse!"

!OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOGYUSHI

...Good. The spinning stopped.

That aside, if I can create wind with magic, doesn’t that make Wind Pressure Masturbation pointless?

No, this isn’t the time to be thinking about that.

I can tell my senses have sharpened since coming to space. It feels like my magic intuition improved dramatically. Since there’s no risk of hurting anyone even if my magic goes out of control, I’m going to experiment with everything at full power!

"Dye it in jet-black crimson! Darkness Not-Hot Fire!"

GOOOOOOH!

It worked! Non-hot flames came out!

What the hell is this? Even if I charge straight into it—

"It doesn’t feel hot at all."

I don’t really get it, but something came out anyway!

In that case, maybe I can fire off gravity waves or something too?

"Dye it in jet-black nothingness! Darkness Gravity!"

GYUINGYUIIN, BYUUUUUUUUUUUUUUN.

U-uwah. Something came out. It felt more like it leaked out than I intentionally fired it.

What the hell is this? I can’t see anything, but I felt a strange sensation like passing through a thin membrane.

Probably gravity waves, anti-gravity, super electromagnetic force, or some other incomprehensible thing.

Magic really can do anything, huh. Alright, I’ll repeat this a few times to stop.

I fired the magic several times, but I couldn’t really feel the effect.

That’s because the surroundings are just pitch-black space with distant starlight. No matter what I look at, I can’t tell if my speed is decreasing.

The scenery hasn’t changed at all.

"Ugh..."

It’s getting hard to breathe.

Don’t tell me my oxygen is running out?

Before I can even make it back to the original star... my breath...

Guuh...

T-That’s right...

"Dye it in jet-black blue! Darkness Oxygen!"

Haa haa haa...

...It worked.

That was close. I should have tried that earlier.

But this is a serious situation.

I can feel my magic power decreasing, like my stomach is getting empty.

If this continues, either my magic power will run out and the barrier will disappear, or I won’t be able to make oxygen anymore.

Hm?

Something flashed far away. It’s blinking on and off.

Could that be the light of civilization?

Am I seriously about to make first contact with an unknown civilization in the universe of another world?

"Darkness Wind!"

I correct my trajectory and head toward the light.

If that flickering light in the distance is a civilization, there might be oxygen there.

I’ll take a break once I get closer and recover my magic power.

As I approached, I gradually understood what the light was.

...Hey, hey. Are you serious?

Just a few hours ago I was racing with a dog girl and a horse girl...

I was reincarnated into a fantasy isekai Europe...

And now there are giant space battleships and giant humanoid robots fighting each other.

What the hell is going on with this other world?

It’s not impossible for there to be an advanced civilization somewhere far away if this isekai has space, but what are the odds of actually encountering one?

Well, none of that matters right now.

If those are giant space battleships, there might be oxygen, space onaholes, and space erotic books.

In the best case, they might even give me a ride back to the original star.

Alright. I’m boarding the biggest space battleship there.

"Darkness Wind!"

I adjust my relative speed with magic while approaching the space battleship.
